calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar Apr-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Gender Change and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Alyson Overton, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Merrill Alano present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Declaration of Sworn Physician on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name and gender were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations of the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Gender Change and Issuance of New Birthday Certificate from female to male.
Order Changing Gender and Issuing New Birth Certificate signed in open court.
